data.title: Nike, Fedex, Blackberry, Rigetti, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: Major U.S. indices closed Thursday with mixed results. The Dow Jones Industrial Average edged up by 0.04% for the day.

data.title: Tom Lee Explains Why 'Fewer Cuts In 2025' Could Boost The Market, Urges Investors To 'Buy The Dip' Amid Recent Volatility
data.description: U.S. stock markets could benefit from fewer interest rate cuts in 2025 despite recent volatility, according to Fundstrat's head of research Tom Lee, who sees the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance as potentially beneficial for investors.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Retreat Further As Crypto Liquidations Top $1 Billion: Analyst Lays Out Scenario For BTC Losing $96K Support
data.description: The cryptocurrency market cracked further Thursday as risk sentiment remained low following the Federal Reserve’s hawkish statements.

data.title: Instagram Boss Shows How You Can Turn Yourself Into A Puppet — And That's Just The Beginning
data.description: Meta plans to launch an AI-powered video editing feature in 2025, leveraging its Movie Gen AI to enable creators to transform videos with text prompts, as teased by Instagram boss Adam Mosseri.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Thursday Moves: Dumps Buzzing Stocks Tesla And Palantir
data.description: On Thursday, Dec. 19, 2024 Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest sold shares of Tesla and Palantir, both of which have run up considerably for the month.
